metodos.codigoOriginal:
Select TmpRelat
Go Top
*!*	If crSigCdOpeD.carcompos = 5 && Carrega composiçăo, - estoque
	Report form SigReDc2 To Printer NoConsole
*!*	Else
*!*		Report form SigReDcu To Printer NoConsole
*!*	EndIf
DoDefault()

Select TmpRel
Go Top In TmpRel
=DoDefault()

Local lnCnt

lnCnt = 1

For lnCnt = 1 To ThisForm.Qbols
	Select TmpRelat
	Go Top
	_Prompt = Iif(InList(ThisForm.TpImpressao, 2, 4), [], [Prompt])
	Report Form SigReDc2 To Printer &_prompt NoConsole
Next

Lparameters qbols, Pcnx, cEmail, pEmp, pDop, pNum, pImpress, pForm, pChkImpDoc

Local lnBotW, lnOldW

Thisform.oForm = pForm
ThisForm.Contaemail = cEmail

ThisForm.pcEmps  = pEmp
ThisForm.pcDopes = pDop
ThisForm.pcNumes = pNum

ThisForm.Imptodaspaginas = .F.

=DoDefault()

Thisform.Qbols = qbols
ThisForm.Conexao = Pcnx
ThisForm.poDataMgr2 = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)
goSistema.ControlaImp = .F. 
ThisForm.Caption = 'Impressăo de Documento ('+Alltrim(pDop)+'/'+Alltrim(Str(pNum))+'... [TRUNCADO]

analise.metodosFormChamados: poDataMgr2 = CreateObject,Caption = 'Impressăo de Documento,Tpimpressao = Iif,Visible And InList,Click,SqlExecute,Value = Int,Visible = fChecaAcesso,pcEmps, 3) + Padr

metodos.codigoOriginal:
Thisform.AlwaysOnTop = .f.

ThisForm.ImpTodaspaginas = ThisForm.chkImpPag.Value 

Select TmpRelat
Goto Top

ThisForm.oForm.Enabled = .t.
Set Printer to Default
DoDefault()
ThisForm.poDataMgr2.Release

Local lnCnt

lnCnt = 1

For lnCnt = 1 To ThisForm.Qbols
	Select TmpRelat
	Go Top
*!*		If crSigCdOpeD.carcompos = 5 && Carrega composiçăo, - estoque
		Report Form SigReDc2 Preview NoConsole 
*!*		Else
*!*			Report Form SigReDcu Preview 	
*!*		EndIf
Next

thisform.impGarantia()

Local lcFil, llRet, lnJpg, lcSep, lcPnt

lcSep = Set([Separator])
lcPnt = Set([Point])

If InList(goSistema.QtdDecimais, 0, 2)
	Set Separator To [,]
	Set Point To [.]
Else
	Set Separator To [.]
	Set Point To [,]
EndIf 

If (This.Value = 4) && Encerrar
	Set Separator To (lcSep)
	Set Point To (lcPnt)

	ThisForm.Release

	Return .t.
Else
	goSistema.ControlaImp = .f.
	If (((This.Value = 2) And Not ThisForm.lAcImprimir) Or ;
		((This.Value = 3) And Not ThisForm.lAcExcel))

		Set Separator To (lcSep)
... [TRUNCADO]

Select TmpRel
Goto Top

Do SigPrIdc With TmpRel.Emps, TmpRel.Dopes, TmpRel.Numes, 0, Thisform.QBols, ;
				( This.Value ), .T., ThisForm.Conexao,(Thisform.chkImagem.Value = 1),.f.,.f.,Thisform.oForm	&& mena 12/10/2016 - colocada mais uma opçăo de agrupamento

				&&( This.Value = 1 ), .T., ThisForm.Conexao,.f.,.f.,.f.,Thisform.oForm
